HogRush.name: Hog Rush
HogRush.description: Trample over to a tile with meat on it.

HogRush2.description: Trample over to a tile with meat on it and Cleave all units in your way.

Burp.name: Burp
Burp.description: Inflict Rot on a unit and it moves away from you.

Burp2.description: Inflict Rot 2 and Poison 2 on a unit and it moves away from you.

SelfMutilate.name: Self Harm
SelfMutilate.description: Attack yourself with Cleave to gain +2 [img:str].

SelfMutilate2.description: Attack yourself at half damage with Cleave to gain +2 [img:str].

ForceFeed.name: Force Feed
ForceFeed.description: Heal an adjacent unit and give that unit +1 [img:con] and -1 [img:spd].

ForceFeed2.name: Force Feed
ForceFeed2.description: Heal a unit within range and give that unit +1 [img:con] and -1 [img:spd].

Fartoom.name: Fartoom!
Fartoom.description: Lose 25% of your current HP, deal that much damage to adjacent units, and deal Knockback to them.

Fartoom2.description: Lose 25% of your HP, deal that much damage to nearby units, and deal Knockback to them.

Mutilate.name: Mutilate
Mutilate.description: Attack 3-5 times for 1 damage each. These attacks inflict Bleed.

Mutilate2.description: Attack 3-10 times for 1 damage each. These attacks inflict Bleed.

SkullBash.name: Skull Bash
SkullBash.description: A range 1 dash attack that inflicts Stun and knockback. Also stuns yourself.

SkullBash2.description: A range 4 dash attack that inflicts Stun and knockback. Has a 50% chance to stun yourself.

Shred.name: Shred
Shred.description: Attack five times for 1 damage each. These attacks inflict all status effects your basic attack does.

Shred2.description: Attack five times with damage that scales with [img:str]. These attacks inflict all status effects your basic attack does.

Chomp.name: Chomp
Chomp.description: A melee attack with Life Steal. If used on an ally, gain +1[img:str]. If used on a pickup, gain double that pickup's effects.

Chomp2.description: A wide melee attack with Life Steal. If used on an ally, gain +1[img:str]. If used on a pickup, gain double that pickup's effects.

Succ.name: SUCC
Succ.description: Collect a pickup within two tiles of you.

Succ2.description: Collect all pickups within two tiles of you.

Consume.name: Consume
Consume.description: Collect all pickups, then become drowsy.

Consume2.description: Collect all pickups, then become drowsy. Gain double the effects of these pickups.

Trudge.name: Trudge
Trudge.description: Move four tiles. Costs less mana the lower your HP is.

Trudge2.description: Trample over four tiles. Costs less mana the lower your HP is.

BodySlam.name: Body Slam
BodySlam.description: Jump to a tile within range 2. Damage both yourself and units you land on equal to 25% of your current HP.

BodySlam2.description: Jump to a tile within range 2. Damage both yourself and units you land on equal to 25% of your current HP. This attack inflicts Bruise and has a chance to Stun.

BloodMagic.name: Blood Magic
BloodMagic.description:
Take 5 damage and gain 5 mana.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

BloodMagic2.description:
Take 5 damage and gain 10 mana.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

SmellBlood.name: Smell Blood
SmellBlood.description: Until your next turn, if a unit in your attack range takes physical damage from a source that isn't you, you attack that unit.

SmellBlood2.description:
Until your next turn, if a unit in your attack range takes physical damage from a source that isn't you, you attack that unit.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

Vurp.name: Vurp
Vurp.description:
Vomit up the last consumable you ate this battle and equip it.
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]

Vurp2.description:
Vomit up the last consumable you ate this battle and equip it.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

SliceAndDice.name: Slice and Dice
SliceAndDice.description: Dash forward one tile and do a spin attack with Cleave, then repeat twice more.

SliceAndDice2.description: Dash forward one tile and do a spin attack with Cleave, then repeat four more times.

LunchTime.name: Lunch Time
LunchTime.description: Jump to a food pickup in range 4.

Tromp.name: Tromp
Tromp.description: Trample over one tile. If you trample over a unit, you inflict Bruise on that unit and yourself.

Tromp2.name: Tromp
Tromp2.description: Trample over one tile. If you trample over a unit, you inflict Bruise on that unit.

LightenTheLoad.name: Lighten the Load
LightenTheLoad.description:
Take 25 damage. You take an extra turn after this one.
[s:.7](This spell can't be cast on extra turns.)[/s]

LightenTheLoad2.description:
Take 15 damage. You take an extra turn after this one.
[s:.7](This spell can't be cast on extra turns.)[/s]

Crushinator.name: Crushinator
Crushinator.description: This spell only damages Shield. Cleave and inflict Stun on units with Shield. Deals 3 Knockback to units without Shield.

Crushinator2.description: This spell only damages Shield. Cleave and inflict Stun on units with Shield. Deals 10 Knockback to units without Shield.

CannonBall.name: Cannon Ball!
CannonBall.description:
Target any tile. At the beginning of your next turn, jump to that tile. If you land on a unit, stun it.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

CannonBall2.description:
Target any tile. At the beginning of your next turn, jump to that tile. If you land on a unit, damage and stun it.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

Monch.name: Monch
Monch.description: A melee attack with lifesteal. This spell does more damage the less health you have.

Monch2.description:
A melee attack with lifesteal. This spell does more damage the less health you have.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

DeathWind.name: Death Wind
DeathWind.description: Blow wind that inflicts Poison 4 in a cone. The cone is larger the less health you have.

DeathWind2.description:
Blow wind that inflicts Poison 4 in a cone. The cone is larger the less health you have.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

Spoil.name: Spoil
Spoil.description: Turn all food pickups into Rot Flies.

Spoil2.description:
Turn all food pickups into Rot Flies.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

Grill.name: Grill
Grill.description: Light a fire under a food pickup on any tile.

Grill2.description: Light a fire under any tile.

Roast2.description: Breathe a larger cone of fire.

BadGas.name: Bad Gas
BadGas.description: Fart on a unit, inflicting Poison 3 and propelling yourself 3 tiles.

BadGas2.description: Fart on a unit, inflicting Poison 3 and propelling yourself ten tiles. Units in your path get trampled over.

ButcherPurge.name: Purge
ButcherPurge.description: Puke on the tile in front of you. You get -1 [img:con] and +2 [img:spd].

ButcherPurge2.description: Puke on a tile in range. You get -1 [img:con] and +2 [img:spd].

MyTurn.name: My Turn!
MyTurn.description: Steal an allied cat's next turn for yourself.

MyTurn2.description:
Steal an allied cat's next turn for yourself.
[s:.7](This spell costs 1 mana.)[/s]

Gib.name: Gib
Gib.description: Attack a unit in melee range. If this kills it, it becomes 3 food pickups.

Gib2.description: Attack a unit in melee range for more damage. If this kills it, it becomes 3 food pickups.

Swallow.name: Swallow
Swallow.description: Eat a unit and take damage equal to that unit's remaining HP. You can't swallow bosses or large units.

Swallow2.description: Eat a unit within range 2 and take damage equal to half of that unit's remaining HP. You can't swallow bosses or large units.

Track.name: Track
Track.description: Trample one tile toward the nearest food pickup.

Track2.description: Trample two tiles toward the nearest food pickup.

Sharpen.name: Sharpen
Sharpen.description: Your weapon gains +1 damage for the rest of the battle.

Sharpen2.description: Your weapon gains +1 damage for the rest of the battle and you gain +1 Damage.

FireFart.name: Fire Fart
FireFart.description: Inflict Poison 2 and Burn 2 on a unit in melee range.

FireFart2.description: Inflict Poison 2 and Burn 2 in a small cone.

RoughToss.name: Rough Toss
RoughToss.description: Throw an adjacent unit to an empty tile, dealing a lot of damage to that unit.

RoughToss2.description: Throw an adjacent unit to another tile (even if it isnt empty), dealing a lot of damage to that unit and whatever it lands on.

Bowl.name: Bowl
Bowl.description: Roll the bowling ball cat. If it hits something, deal 10 damage in a large cone with knockback.

Bowl2.description: Roll the bowling ball cat. If it hits something, deal 15 damage and inflict Bruise in a large cone with knockback.

TaintedOffering.name: Tainted Offering
TaintedOffering.description: Jump to any open tile and fall asleep. While asleep, inflict Rot 1 and Poison 1 on units that contact you.

TaintedOffering2.description: Jump to any open tile and fall asleep. While asleep, inflict Rot 2 and Poison 2 on units that contact you.

DeliciousScent.name: Delicious Scent
DeliciousScent.description: Inflict Attraction on all enemies within range 4.

DeliciousScent2.name: Delicious Scent
DeliciousScent2.description: Jump to a tile, then inflict Attraction on all enemies within range 4.

Cough.name: Cough
Cough.description:
Take 2 damage.
Summon a Rot Fly.

Cough2.description:
Take 2 damage.
Summon a [img:champion] Rot Fly.

Reflux.name: Reflux
Reflux.description: Take 2 damage and gain Burn 2, then fire a projectile that spawns a lava tile at short range.

Reflux2.description: Take 2 damage and gain Burn 2, then fire a projectile that spawns a lava tile at long range.

Tryptophan.name: Yawn
Tryptophan.description: You and adjacent units fall asleep

Tryptophan2.description: You and adjacent units fall asleep. You gain all stats up and heal 4.

HookBind2.description: Melee attack that immobilizes and inflicts Bleed 2.

Regurge.name: Regurge
Regurge.description: Take 2 damage and spawn a food pickup.

Regurge2.description: Take 2 damage and spawn a big food pickup.

Grapnel.name: Grapnel
Grapnel.description: Lob a hook at an object and pull yourself to it. Trample over tiles in your path.

Grapnel2.description:
Lob a hook at an object and pull yourself to it. Trample over tiles in your path.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

Rehook2.description: Refresh your weapon and movement action.

Contaminate.name: Contaminate
Contaminate.description: Collect an adjacent pickup. Instead of that pickup's normal effects, add Poison 1 to your weapon for the rest of the battle.

Contaminate2.description: Collect a pickup in range 5. Instead of that pickup's normal effects, add Poison 1 to your weapon for the rest of the battle.

LodgeHook.name: Lodge Hook
LodgeHook.description:
Inflict Bleed 10 on an adjacent unit. You can't use your weapon for the rest of the battle.
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]

LodgeHook2.description:
Inflict Bleed 10, Immobilize 2, and Bruise 2 on an adjacent unit. You can't use your weapon for the rest of the battle.
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]

Butcher.name: Butcher
Butcher.description: Kill every unit with 3 or less health. They become meat.

Butcher2.description: Kill every unit with 3 or less health. They become meat. Gain 5 health for each unit killed.

Chonkwalk.name: Chonkwalk
Chonkwalk.description: Deal 5 damage to yourself. Refresh your movement action.

Chonkwalk2.description:
Deal 5 damage to yourself. Refresh your movement action.
PASSIVE: You have Trample.
